1629501.name: Alanna Smith
1629501.injDetail: Smith (lower leg) is doubtful for Thursday's game against the Liberty.

1642800.name: Aneesah Morrow
1642800.injDetail: Morrow (reconditioning) is out for Tuesday's game against the Fire.

1643437.name: Ashlon Jackson
1643437.injDetail: Jackson (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Fire.

1628279.name: Brittney Sykes
1628279.injDetail: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1643424.name: Costanza Verona
1643424.injDetail: Verona (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.

1641657.name: Dorka Juhasz
1641657.injDetail: Juhasz (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Sparks.

1643488.name: Emma Cechova
1643488.injDetail: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

1629496.name: Ezi Magbegor
1629496.injDetail: Magbegor (face) was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be "reevaluated in the next couple of weeks," Percy Allen of the Seattle Times reports.

1641650.name: Haley Jones
1641650.injDetail: Jones (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Sky.

1643469.name: Indya Nivar
1643469.injDetail: Nivar (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Monday's game against the Sparks.

1643527.name: Jordan Harrison
1643527.injDetail: Harrison (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Sun.

1643505.name: Jovana Nogic
1643505.injDetail: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

1642289.name: Kamilla Cardoso
1642289.injDetail: Cardoso (knee) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Storm, per Chicago State of Mind Sports.

1628276.name: Kelsey Plum
1628276.injDetail: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

1631006.name: Kierstan Bell
1631006.injDetail: Bell has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Fever due to a right leg injury.

1643445.name: Kiki Rice
1643445.injDetail: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

1630142.name: Leonie Fiebich
1630142.injDetail: Fiebich (foot) is out for Thursday's game against the Wings, Madeline Kenney of the New York Post reports.

1642818.name: Maddy Westbeld
1642818.injDetail: Westbeld (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Storm.

1630469.name: Marine Fauthoux
1630469.injDetail: Fauthoux (coach's decision) won't play in Sunday's game against Toronto, Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com reports.

1629484.name: Megan Gustafson
1629484.injDetail: Gustafson (personal) is out for Thursday's game against Washington.

1643426.name: Olivia Miles
1643426.injDetail: Head coach Cheryl Reeve had no update on Miles' (ankle) status following Wednesday's 96-87 win over the Sparks, per Andrew Dukowitz of ZoneCoverage.com.

1643487.name: Quionche Carter
1643487.injDetail: Carter (coach's decision) is out for Monday's meeting with Minnesota.

1642288.name: Rickea Jackson
1642288.injDetail: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

1642790.name: Sania Feagin
1642790.injDetail: Feagin (knee) was diagnosed with a torn left ACL on Thursday and will miss the rest of the 2026 campaign, WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland reports.

1642809.name: Saniya Rivers
1642809.injDetail: Rivers (ankle) is out for Tuesday's game against the Fire.

1643470.name: Shay Ciezki
1643470.injDetail: Ciezki (coach's decision) won't play Monday versus Minnesota.

203400.name: Skylar Diggins
203400.injDetail: Head coach Tyler Marsh said Tuesday that Diggins (knee) is without a timetable for a return, Alissa Hirsh of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.

1643444.name: Ta'Niya Latson
1643444.injDetail: Latson (coach's decision) won't play Sunday against the Fever.

1643473.name: Taina Mair
1643473.injDetail: Mair (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Wednesday's game against the Sky.

1643506.name: Teja Oblak
1643506.injDetail: Oblak (illness) is questionable for Thursday's game against the Mystics.

1627701.name: Temi Fagbenle
1627701.injDetail: Fagbenle (concussion) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Mystics.
